title: Smoky Roasted Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: A light and juicy Brazilian dish featuring chicken skewers roasted to perfection with a smoky sugar syrup, perfect for a low-glycemic diet
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, coconut sugar, lime juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, prepare the smoky sugar syrup by heating 2 tablespoons of coconut sugar over low heat until caramelized.
Brush the smoky sugar syrup onto the chicken skewers during the last 5 minutes of cooking.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
